content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from the domain of autonomous agents) can be repurposed to prioritize which new unlabeled data samples get stored and consolidated into an active learning agent's long-term memory, creating a self-sustaining memory pruning pipeline that outperforms current SOTA 2024 static importance scoring methods. This framework lets the agent autonomously grow its knowledge base without human intervention to label or curate training data.
